title.rendered: 22 Must-Read Research Reports for the Nonprofit Sector

content.rendered:
The reports listed below are a small sampling of some of the research available to nonprofits, NGOs, and charities worldwide. The data can be used to help your nonprofit craft your next online communication and fundraising plan.

If you would like to suggest a specific report be added to the list, please contact Heather Mansfield. Most of the reports listed are based on U.S. nonprofit research. Nonprofit Tech for Good is eager to learn about, add, and promote similar reports from other coutnries/regions of the world.

For Nonprofits Worldwide:

1. 2018 Global NGO Online Technology Report :: Download
Published by the Public Interest Registry and Nonprofit Tech for Good

2. Global Landscape of Philanthropy Report 2018 :: Download
Published by the Worldwide Initiatives for Grantmaker Support (WINGS)

3. 2017 Global Trends in Giving Report :: Download
Published by the Public Interest Registry and Nonprofit Tech for Good

4. 2017 World Giving Index :: Download
Published by the Charities Aid Foundation

5. 2017 Giving Around the Globe :: Download
Published by CECP

For Nonprofits in the United States:

6. Next Generation of American Giving :: Download
Published by the Blackbaud Institute

7. 2018 Benchmarks Study :: Download
Published by M+R

8. 2018 Nonprofit Communications Trends Report :: Download
Published by Nonprofit Marketing Guide

9. Social Media Use in 2018 :: Download
Published by the Pew Internet & American Life Project

10. 2018 Fundraising Effectiveness Project :: Download
Published by the Association of Fundraising Professionals

11. 2018 Digital Outlook Report :: Download
Published by Care2, NTEN, hjc, and the Resource Alliance

12. Future of Philanthropy Report 2018 :: Download
Published by Fidelity Charitable

13. Women Give 2018 :: Download
Published by the Lily Family School of Philanthropy

14. 2017 Charitable Giving Report :: Download
Published by the Blackbaud Institute

15. Giving USA 2017 :: Download
Published by the Giving USA Foundation

16. 2017 Digital Member Study :: Download
Published by Community Brands

For Nonprofits in Canada:

17. 2016 Canada’s Charitable Sector :: Download
Published by the Canada Revenue Agency

For Nonprofits in Asia Pacific:

18. Digital Technology in the Non-for-Profit Sector :: Download
Published by Infoxchange (Australia & New Zealand)

19. Charitable Giving in Asia Pacific 2015 :: Download
Published by MasterCard

For Nonprofits in Europe:

20. Charity Digital Skills Report 2018 :: Download
Published by Skills Platform

21. Digital in the Third Sector 2017 :: Download
Published by the Technology Trust

For Nonprofits in Latin America:

22. La Tecnología las OSC de América Latina 2016 :: Download
Published by Wingu

For Nonprofits in the Middle East and Africa:

23. Arab Giving Survey 2016 :: Download
Published by Philanthropy Age

Newly Released! The 2018 Global NGO Technology Report

Published in العَرَبِيَّة, English, français, português y español, the 2018 Global NGO Technology Report is based on the survey results of 5,352 NGOs from 164 countries.
